journal_entry.reason: Recording a business meal expense for an employee working meeting paid with corporate credit card. The meal is classified as Meals and Entertainment Expense (subject to 50% tax deductibility rules in Canada). The credit card payment creates a liability that will be settled when the credit card bill is paid.

output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a business meal expense for a working meeting among employees. The meal should be recorded as a Meals and Entertainment expense (which is typically 50% deductible for tax purposes in Canada). The payment was made using a corporate credit card, which creates a liability (credit card payable). The transaction requires: Debit Meals and Entertainment Expense $125 (expense increase) and Credit Credit Card Payable $125 (liability increase).
